-DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -Wl,-pie -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names
